title: Vacation on EMI
scenario: Your friends are booking a ₹90,000 international trip and the group chat is buzzing. A bank pre-approves you for a personal loan at 16% to fund it, with 'easy' EMIs of about ₹3,200 over three years. You have only ₹20,000 set aside for travel.

choices.label: Do a cheaper domestic trip within your ₹20,000 budget and plan the big one next year
choices.lesson: Matching your plans to your savings keeps memories debt-free; experiences funded by loans are paid for long after they end.

choices.label: Take the personal loan and join the international trip
choices.lesson: Financing a vacation means paying interest for years on a one-week experience, often costing far more than the sticker price.
